title: scleria khasiana
intro: Scleria khasiana, a plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae, is commonly known as the Khasi needle sedge or Khasi needle rush. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Scleria khasiana include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Scleria khasiana include making it into a tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
